---
package: "openpipeline"
version: "v4.2.0"
title: "from_h5ad_to_h5mu"
namespace: "Convert"
description: "Converts a single layer h5ad file into a single MuData object"
type: "module"
toc: false
latest: "true"
subtitle: "openpipeline v4.2.0"
---

::: {.column-margin}

### Info

ID: `from_h5ad_to_h5mu`  
Namespace: `convert`

### Links

[{{< fa brands github >}} View source code](https://github.com/openpipelines-bio/openpipeline/tree/v4.2.0/src/convert/from_h5ad_to_h5mu)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Browse all versions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Get run instructions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline/v4.2.0/components/convert/from_h5ad_to_h5mu)

:::



## Example commands

You can run the pipeline using `nextflow run`.

### View help

You can use `--help` as a parameter to get an overview of the possible parameters.

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline \
  -r v4.2.0 -latest \
  -main-script target/nextflow/convert/from_h5ad_to_h5mu/main.nf \
  --help
```

### Run command

<details>
<summary>Example of `params.yaml`</summary>

Generate a `params.yaml` for this component on [Viash Hub](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline/v4.2.0/components/convert/from_h5ad_to_h5mu).

</details>

Run locally with:

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline \
  -r v4.2.0 -latest \
  -profile docker \
  -main-script target/nextflow/convert/from_h5ad_to_h5mu/main.nf \
  -params-file params.yaml
```

:::{.callout-note}
Replace `-profile docker` with `-profile podman` or `-profile singularity` depending on the desired backend.
:::

Running on Seqera or through Viash Hub is explained in the [guides](/guides/index.qmd).

## Argument group

### Arguments

|Name                   |Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |Attributes                                                             |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--input`              |Input h5ad files                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |List of `file`, required, default: `"input.h5ad"`, multiple_sep: `";"` |
|`--modality`           |List of names to use for the modalities. Will be used as the keys in the .mod attribute in the output MuData object The number of items provided for this argument equal the number of input files (--input) and their order should match. |List of `string`, default: `"rna"`, multiple_sep: `";"`                |
|`--output`             |Output MuData file.                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |`file`, default: `"output.h5mu"`                                       |
|`--output_compression` |Compression format to use for the output AnnData and/or Mudata H5 files. By default no compression is applied.                                                                                                                             |`string`, example: `"gzip"`                                            |

## Authors


  * Dries De Maeyer [{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/ddemaeyer) [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/dries-de-maeyer-b46a814) (maintainer)
